description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds a Linux distribution on multiple environments. The workflow should trigger on push and pull request events. It should have separate jobs for Fedora, OpenSUSE Leap, OpenSUSE Tumbleweed, ArchLinux, and ArchLinux (System), each using the corresponding Docker image and running a series of steps to install Git, checkout the code with submodules, install dependencies, and build the project.
